Dashboard Archive: 2026-03-16 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Short-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns (1d to 1y), SMA gate (above 30/50/100/200 day), ratio consistency across timeframes, and resilience on bad SPY days. Higher composite scores indicate stronger, more consistent short-term momentum.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: momentum-ranker Today's data reveals an extraordinary outlier in TNGX, which ranks #1 with a composite score of 97.8—driven by stunning absolute returns of 870% over one year, 176% over six months, and 98% over three months. TNGX passes all SMA gates (trading above its 30/50/100/200-day averages) and maintains consistent ratio expansion across timeframes, with particularly strong acceleration from 1-month to 3-month returns (2.32x multiple). Most notably, TNGX outperforms SPY by 849% annually and maintains this edge relative to both QQQ and IAU, demonstrating resilience that scores exceptionally high on bad market days (1.32 bad_spy_score). In sharp contrast, LINC ranks second with more modest 1-year returns of 164% and shows weaker relative outperformance versus broad benchmarks, suggesting TNGX represents a genuinely exceptional momentum case rather than broad market participation. The data indicates TNGX's gains are concentrated in higher timeframes rather than today's modest 4.3% single-day move, suggesting this is an established trend rather than a fresh breakout.
